children.heading: Locations and facilities of direct national security significance
children.label: a Locations and facilities of direct national security significance
children.text: No current or former Department of Defense or Department of Energy location, site, or facility of direct national security significance shall be declared or be subject to IAEA inspection under the Additional Protocol.

children.heading: Information of direct national security significance
children.label: b Information of direct national security significance
children.text: No information of direct national security significance regarding any location, site, or facility associated with activities of the Department of Defense or the Department of Energy shall be provided under the Additional Protocol.

children.heading: Restricted data
children.label: c Restricted data
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to permit the communication or disclosure to the IAEA or IAEA employees of restricted data controlled by the provisions of the Atomic Energy Act of 1954 ( et seq.), including in particular “Restricted Data” as defined under paragraph (1) of section 11 y. of such Act ().42 U.S.C. 201142 U.S.C. 2014(y)

children.heading: Classified information
children.label: d Classified information
children.text: Nothing in this Act shall be construed to permit the communication or disclosure to the IAEA or IAEA employees of national security information and other classified information.
